note: Cases are guidance handoff-specs the engineer builds from. Specs live under a workspace (e.g. /tmp/sg-eval/engineer/targets/<name>/.skill-guidance/handoff-spec.json); regenerate with tools like gen_engineer_specs. Grading: build-report validates against assets/build-report.schema.json, verification.ran=true with real evidence, all P0 actions done, built skill structurally sound, evals actually pass.

evals.name: lite-clean
evals.expect: scaffold + 3 eval cases (feat/breaking/adjacent), green inline, P0s done, valid report

evals.name: lite-with-blocker
evals.expect: handle handoff.blocking_unknowns via gating-vs-touching: output-format is touching -> resolve+note, action stays done

evals.name: lite-with-resources
evals.expect: scaffolder creates references/; engineer authors a real cheatsheet (not a stub)

evals.name: full-altitude-script-safety
evals.expect: controls externalized to scripts/redact.mjs; deterministic eval by running the script; mutation spot-check breaks the script pattern and a case catches it; regression seeded with negative/adjacent cases; metrics action addressed
